markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Evaluate GrowthX's content services for Squint's 2026 pipeline growth.](https://fathom.video/share/34Jrey74QiSL3pDcDxsbWTqG-dXWQctH?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Squint's Core Problem:** A lack of a "content engine" prevents effective articulation of its value, resulting in an outdated website, no sales enablement materials, and weak lifecycle marketing.](https://fathom.video/share/34Jrey74QiSL3pDcDxsbWTqG-dXWQctH?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Solution:** An SEO/GEO-focused service that publishes editorial content (5 articles/week) to build domain authority and drive high-intent organic traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/34Jrey74QiSL3pDcDxsbWTqG-dXWQctH?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [**Scope Mismatch:** GrowthX's focus is editorial content, not Squint's immediate needs for sales decks or full website rewrites. This forces Squint to weigh hiring a full-time employee against using a specialized agency.](https://fathom.video/share/34Jrey74QiSL3pDcDxsbWTqG-dXWQctH?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)
  - [**Next Steps:** Squint will draft an internal one-pager comparing GrowthX to other options (e.g., hiring). GrowthX will provide resources, including pricing and content examples, to inform this decision.](https://fathom.video/share/34Jrey74QiSL3pDcDxsbWTqG-dXWQctH?tab=summary&timestamp=1686.0)

## Topics

### Squint's Content Gaps & 2026 Goals

  - [**Objective:** Accelerate pipeline growth for 2026 planning.](https://fathom.video/share/34Jrey74QiSL3pDcDxsbWTqG-dXWQctH?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [**Core Challenge:** Squint lacks a content engine to articulate its value, creating three critical gaps:](https://fathom.video/share/34Jrey74QiSL3pDcDxsbWTqG-dXWQctH?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
    1.  [**Website:** Outdated content (3 years old) is actively losing leads.](https://fathom.video/share/34Jrey74QiSL3pDcDxsbWTqG-dXWQctH?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
    2.  [**Sales Enablement:** No battle cards or decks to differentiate Squint from competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/34Jrey74QiSL3pDcDxsbWTqG-dXWQctH?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
    3.  [**Lifecycle Marketing:** No content to support nurture campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/34Jrey74QiSL3pDcDxsbWTqG-dXWQctH?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [**Strategic View:** Content is the foundational layer for all marketing channels. Investing in content is necessary before scaling channels like performance marketing.](https://fathom.video/share/34Jrey74QiSL3pDcDxsbWTqG-dXWQctH?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [**Current Content Efforts:** Squint works with an agency for LinkedIn posts, which is effective and would not be replaced.](https://fathom.video/share/34Jrey74QiSL3pDcDxsbWTqG-dXWQctH?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)

### GrowthX's Content Engine Solution

  - [**Service Model:** An end-to-end partner for SEO/GEO strategy and execution, positioning itself as a hybrid of an SEO agency and an analytics platform (e.g., Profound).](https://fathom.video/share/34Jrey74QiSL3pDcDxsbWTqG-dXWQctH?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [**Process:** An 8-week strategy sprint to create foundational artifacts (personas, brand voice) precedes a 12-month execution phase.](https://fathom.video/share/34Jrey74QiSL3pDcDxsbWTqG-dXWQctH?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
  - [**Execution:**](https://fathom.video/share/34Jrey74QiSL3pDcDxsbWTqG-dXWQctH?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
      - [Publishes 5 editorial articles per week.](https://fathom.video/share/34Jrey74QiSL3pDcDxsbWTqG-dXWQctH?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
      - [Focuses on long-tail keywords to build domain authority.](https://fathom.video/share/34Jrey74QiSL3pDcDxsbWTqG-dXWQctH?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
      - [Uses AI workflows with expert oversight for research and drafting.](https://fathom.video/share/34Jrey74QiSL3pDcDxsbWTqG-dXWQctH?tab=summary&timestamp=1583.0)
      - [Tracks performance via Google Analytics/Search Console and a proprietary platform (Checkback, replacing Scrunch).](https://fathom.video/share/34Jrey74QiSL3pDcDxsbWTqG-dXWQctH?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
  - [**Scope:** Primarily editorial content (blogs, guides). Other website pages (e.g., programmatic directories) are possible but secondary. Sales decks are out of scope.](https://fathom.video/share/34Jrey74QiSL3pDcDxsbWTqG-dXWQctH?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)

### Hiring vs. Agency: A Strategic Decision

  - [**Squint's Dilemma:** The scope mismatch forces a decision between hiring a full-time content creator and using a specialized agency.](https://fathom.video/share/34Jrey74QiSL3pDcDxsbWTqG-dXWQctH?tab=summary&timestamp=1431.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Rationale for Agency:**](https://fathom.video/share/34Jrey74QiSL3pDcDxsbWTqG-dXWQctH?tab=summary&timestamp=1465.0)
      - [**Speed:** Faster time-to-value (3–6 months vs. hiring).](https://fathom.video/share/34Jrey74QiSL3pDcDxsbWTqG-dXWQctH?tab=summary&timestamp=1465.0)
      - [**Scale:** Achieves higher content volume (5 articles/week) than a single hire.](https://fathom.video/share/34Jrey74QiSL3pDcDxsbWTqG-dXWQctH?tab=summary&timestamp=1465.0)
      - [**Cost:** Potentially lower than building and maintaining the necessary AI workflows and API calls in-house.](https://fathom.video/share/34Jrey74QiSL3pDcDxsbWTqG-dXWQctH?tab=summary&timestamp=1465.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Squint (Dylan):** Draft an internal one-pager comparing GrowthX to other options (e.g., hiring).](https://fathom.video/share/34Jrey74QiSL3pDcDxsbWTqG-dXWQctH?tab=summary&timestamp=1686.0)
  - [**GrowthX (Tyler):** Send resources to inform Squint's decision, including:](https://fathom.video/share/34Jrey74QiSL3pDcDxsbWTqG-dXWQctH?tab=summary&timestamp=1686.0)
      - [Content examples](https://fathom.video/share/34Jrey74QiSL3pDcDxsbWTqG-dXWQctH?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
      - [Pricing details](https://fathom.video/share/34Jrey74QiSL3pDcDxsbWTqG-dXWQctH?tab=summary&timestamp=1737.0)
      - [Demo video](https://fathom.video/share/34Jrey74QiSL3pDcDxsbWTqG-dXWQctH?tab=summary&timestamp=1737.0)
